prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Duratec HE 2.3L (engine code: *Duratec 23EW*) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a custom 272° camshaft from Kent Cams (Part #272H) and a Jenvey Dynamics ITB kit (45mm throttle bodies) with individual velocity stacks for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (12psi max boost) mounted on a custom billet aluminum intake manifold, paired with a custom intercooler setup from PWR (Part #PWI1000) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Scorpion 4-2-1 header and a straight-pipe backbox for maximum flow.

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX25 coilovers (double-adjustable, 250lb/in springs) and polybushings from SuperPro (Part #SPF1036K) for the front wishbones. Rear setup includes a custom rose-jointed Panhard rod and adjustable toe links from Westfield Sportscars (Part #WSP-ATL). Braking upgraded to AP Racing CP6640 calipers with 280mm vented discs up front and CP5200 calipers with 240mm discs at the rear, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork kit from Westfield Sportscars (Part #WSP-CF-KIT), including a single-piece front splitter, side skirts, and a rear diffuser with integrated LED brake light. Carbon fiber bonnet with a central NACA duct for engine bay cooling.

Custom lightweight aluminum sidepods with integrated cooling vents and a bespoke fuel filler cap from Stack Racing (Part #SR-FFC-01). Rear wing upgrade to a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber wing from 9 Lives Racing (Part #9LR-W7-1000), adjustable for angle and height.

Interior stripped and fitted with a full Sparco Pro2000 seat (Part #00778NR) and a 6-point harness from Schroth (Part #ASM2784F). Steering wheel replaced with a MOMO Mod.77 (330mm diameter) wrapped in Alcantara, paired with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations (Part #NRG-200). Custom digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (Part #AIM-MXS-STRADA) with integrated data logging.
